phase-summary.outcome: Phase opened. Internal quote workflow, dashboard UX, scorecard definitions, operating rhythm, and asset-growth guidance are now documented and partially surfaced in the admin portal. The customer dashboard now stays separate from the admin ops dashboard, the portal shell constrains overflow correctly, the command center uses a left-rail navigator instead of a cramped horizontal tab row, and `/ops` now exposes runtime CRM provider controls for admins.

file.description: Internal admin ops dashboard route with runtime CRM provider state.
Admin-only runtime toggle for switching the active CRM provider.
Left-rail command-center navigator and detail panes for daily ops, scorecard, milestones, and assets.
Responsive chart controls that no longer overlap dashboard content.
Admin-facing config for growth and system context.
Dashboard-specific operator board and trend data.

next.action: Decide when to promote dashboard KPI and ops settings into an editable Payload global and whether more runtime controls belong in Payload schema or should stay migration-free.
